                (function(){
                  function ensure(content){
                    var head = document.head;
                    if (!head || head.querySelector('meta[name="next-head-count"]')) return;
                    var meta = document.createElement('meta');
                    meta.setAttribute('name', 'next-head-count');
                    meta.setAttribute('content', content == null ? '0' : content);
                    head.appendChild(meta);
                  }
                  function start(){
                    ensure('0');
                    if (typeof MutationObserver !== 'undefined' && document.head) {
                      new MutationObserver(function(mutations){
                        var preserved = null;
                        for (var i = 0; i < mutations.length; i++) {
                          var removed = mutations[i].removedNodes;
                          for (var j = 0; j < removed.length; j++) {
                            var n = removed[j];
                            if (n.nodeType === 1 && n.tagName === 'META' &&
                                n.getAttribute && n.getAttribute('name') === 'next-head-count') {
                              preserved = n.getAttribute('content');
                              break;
                            }
                          }
                          if (preserved !== null) break;
                        }
                        ensure(preserved);
                      }).observe(document.head, { childList: true });
                    }
                  }
                  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
                    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', start);
                  } else {
                    start();
                  }
                })();

defer=""></script><script src="https://cdn-cookieyes.com/client_data/6dccfb6ae7f0428f395c631e/banner.js" async="" id="cookieyes-banner"></script><style type="text/css">/**
  * Separate css due to complex nature of styling the Flicking arrows
  */ 

.flicking-arrow-prev,
.flicking-arrow-next {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  cursor: pointer;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  z-index: 2;
}

.flicking-arrow-prev.is-circle,
.flicking-arrow-next.is-circle {
  border-radius: 50%;
}

.flicking-arrow-disabled.is-circle {
  background-color: rgb(10 10 10 / 10%);
}

.flicking-arrow-prev.is-circle::before,
.flicking-arrow-prev.is-circle::after,
.flicking-arrow-next.is-circle::before,
.flicking-arrow-next.is-circle::after {
  background-color: white;
}

.flicking-arrow-prev {
  left: 10px;
}
.flicking-arrow-next {
  right: 2px;
}

.flicking-arrow-prev.is-outside {
  left: 0;
}
.flicking-arrow-next.is-outside {
  right: 0;
}

.flicking-arrow-prev::before,
.flicking-arrow-prev::after,
.flicking-arrow-next::before,
.flicking-arrow-next::after {
  content: "";
  width: 12px;
  height: 6px;
  position: absolute;
}
.flicking-arrow-prev::before {
  top: 50%;
  left: 11px;
  transform: rotate(-45deg);
  transform-origin: 0% 50%;
}
.flicking-arrow-prev::after {
  top: calc(50% - 4px);
  left: 11px;
  transform: rotate(45deg);
  transform-origin: 0% 50%;
}
.flicking-arrow-next::before {
  top: 50%;
  right: 11px;
  transform: rotate(45deg);
  transform-origin: 100% 50%;
}
.flicking-arrow-next::after {
  top: calc(50% - 4px);
  right: 11px;
  transform: rotate(-45deg);
  transform-origin: 100% 50%;
}

.flicking-arrow-disabled {
  cursor: default;
}

.flicking-arrow-disabled::before,
.flicking-arrow-disabled::after {
  background-color: #e6e6e6;
}

.flicking-arrow-prev.is-thin::before,
.flicking-arrow-prev.is-thin::after,
.flicking-arrow-next.is-thin::before,
.flicking-arrow-next.is-thin::after{
  height: 3px;
}

.flicking-arrow-prev.is-thin::after,
.flicking-arrow-next.is-thin::after{
  top: calc(50% - 2px);
}</style><style type="text/css">.flicking-viewport {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.flicking-viewport.vertical {
  display: inline-flex;
}

.flicking-viewport.vertical > .flicking-camera {
  display: inline-flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.flicking-viewport.flicking-hidden > .flicking-camera > * {
  visibility: hidden;
}

.flicking-camera {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  display: flex;
  position: relative;
  flex-direction: row;
  z-index: 1;
  will-change: transform;
}

.flicking-camera > * {
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

            (function tagClarityWithExperiments() {
              var MAX_TAGS = 15;
              var MAX_TRIES = 5;
              var RETRY_MS = 1000;
              var tries = 0;
              function run() {
                if (typeof window.clarity !== 'function') {
                  if (++tries < MAX_TRIES) {
                    setTimeout(run, RETRY_MS);
                  }
                  return;
                }
                var enrolled = {};
                var notEnrolled = {};
                document.cookie.split(';').forEach(function (c) {
                  var m = c.trim().match(/^__experiment_(not_enrolled_)?(.+?)=(.+)$/);
                  if (!m) return;
                  (m[1] ? notEnrolled : enrolled)[m[2]] = m[3];
                });
                var tagged = 0;
                var capHit = false;
                function pushTag(slug, variant) {
                  if (tagged >= MAX_TAGS) { capHit = true; return; }
                  try {
                    window.clarity('set', 'exp_' + slug, variant);
                    tagged++;
                  } catch (e) {}
                }
                Object.keys(enrolled).forEach(function (slug) {
                  pushTag(slug, enrolled[slug]);
                });
                if (true) {
                  Object.keys(notEnrolled).forEach(function (slug) {
                    if (!(slug in enrolled)) pushTag(slug, notEnrolled[slug]);
                  });
                }
                if (capHit) {
                  try { window.clarity('set', 'exp_cap_hit', '1'); } catch (e) {}
                }
              }
              run();
            })();
